name: Buttermilk
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the water into a quart jar.
2. Add the dry powdered milk to the water in the jar and stir until dissolved.
3. Add the commercial buttermilk and salt to the mixture, then stir until blended.
4. Let the mixture stand at room temperature until thickened.
5. Stir just until blended before using.
6. Refrigerate any unused portion.
7. Save 1/2 cup of buttermilk to use as a base for the next batch.
